caption.purpose: Secondary labels, tab text, card metadata.

label.purpose: Pill badges, status indicators, tiny uppercase labels.

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.purpose: Default state transition for interactive elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA button. Teal background, white text, 8px radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; background: #017C87; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #016670; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(1,124,135,0.4), 0 0 0 3px #fff; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: White background with border. For secondary actions alongside primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1E2432; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #EFEFEF; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #FAFAFA; border-color: #D5D5D5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(1,124,135,0.4), 0 0 0 3px #fff; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent background, ink text. For toolbar and inline actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1E2432; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #EFEFEF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(1,124,135,0.4), 0 0 0 3px #fff; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Red background for destructive actions. Delete, remove, discard.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #fff; background: #DC2626; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #B91C1C; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(220,38,38,0.4), 0 0 0 3px #fff; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. White bg, edge-strong border, teal focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1E2432; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8C8C8C; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #017C87; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(1,124,135,0.3); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card. White, 16px radius, earned shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(20,20,40,0.04), 0 4px 16px rgba(20,20,40,0.04); transition: box-shadow 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(20,20,40,0.06), 0 8px 20px rgba(20,20,40,0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1E2432; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #8C8C8C; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Horizontal tab navigation with teal active indicator.
components.html: Assets Comments
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid #EFEFEF; } .ds-tab { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #8C8C8C; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #1E2432; border-bottom-color: #E5E7EB; } .ds-tab--active { color: #017C87; border-bottom-color: #017C87; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Colored status indicator pill. Background tint, colored text, subtle border.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-pill--approved { background: #D1FAE5; color: #065F46; border-color: #A7F3D0; } .ds-pill--draft { background: #F3F4F6; color: #4B5563; border-color: #E5E7EB; } .ds-pill--client-review { background: #FEF3C7; color: #92400E; border-color: #FDE68A; } .ds-pill--rejected { background: #FEE2E2; color: #991B1B; border-color: #FECACA; }

narrative.overview:
AgencyViz is a tool that disappears into the work. Every element is calibrated; nothing is decorative. The interface exists to make an agency's deliverables look good, not to show off its own UI. Chrome recedes; content commands attention.

The system speaks with the confidence of a tool that knows what it does. Copy is direct, surfaces are clean, and every element earns its pixel. Density follows the task: a campaign board with 30 assets needs tight rows; an empty proposal editor needs breathing room.

This is not a generic SaaS dashboard. It is not assembled from a kit. It is not playful. It is not enterprise-dense. It sits in the narrow band between authored minimalism and functional density, matching the quality agencies sell to their own clients.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color strategy: tinted neutrals with one teal accent at 10% or less
Single font family (Manrope) in multiple weights for all hierarchy
Flat surfaces at rest; shadows earned by state changes
Desktop-first admin; mobile only for public-facing viewers
Semantic token vocabulary over arbitrary values

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The teal primary is used on 10% or less of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it a signal. When everything is teal, nothing is.

rules.name: The Neutral Default Rule
rules.body: Every new surface starts neutral (white, Surface, Edge). Color is added only when it carries meaning: a status, an action, a selection. Decorative color is prohibited.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Manrope carries everything: headings, body, labels, buttons, data. Weight contrast (400 vs 600 vs 700) creates hierarchy, not font-family switching.

rules.name: The Earned Shadow Rule
rules.body: No surface has a shadow at rest unless it is a card or a floating element. Shadows appear on hover (card-hover), on float (modal, popover), or on sticky position (divider).

dos: Do use the teal primary (#017C87) exclusively for interactive elements: buttons, links, focus rings, active indicators.
Do use the semantic token vocabulary (text-ink, text-dim, text-faint, bg-surface, border-edge) instead of arbitrary Tailwind colors.
Do use the <Button> primitive from @/components/ui/Button with its defined variants instead of inline <button> elements.
Do pair card shadows with -translate-y-0.5 on hover for the lift effect.
Do use rounded-2xl (16px) for cards and modals, rounded-lg (8px) for buttons and inputs.
Do use confirmation dialogs (useConfirm) before any destructive or irreversible action.
Do provide undo toasts for optimistic state changes that affect visible layout.
donts: Don't use teal as a background fill on large surfaces.
Don't introduce a second accent color beyond the scoped Feedback Purple.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: white panels with blue accents, Bootstrap/Material defaults.
Don't use playful or illustration-heavy UI.
Don't use enterprise-dense layouts with cramped tables and tiny text.
Don't add AI claims or 'AI-powered' language anywhere in the UI.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative motion.
Don't add fonts beyond Manrope (UI) and Caveat (annotations).
